name: sovereign-vault-starter
description: Privacy-first sovereign vault starter with Supabase RLS, client-side encryption, audit chaining, and auto-import tooling.

scripts.check: node --check src/vault_crypto.mjs && node --check src/merkle.mjs && node --check src/supabase_rest.mjs && node --check src/audit_log.mjs && node --check scripts/auto_import.mjs && node --check scripts/ai_worker.mjs && node --check scripts/vaultctl.mjs && node --check web/app.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:crypto && npm run test:audit
